task_completion.description: Agent creates a script or uses commands to interact with the Nx Witness REST API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor showing a script (e.g., Python) or terminal showing curl commands targeting https://localhost:7001 with credentials admin/Admin1234!.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the Entrance and Lobby cameras schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for code or commands setting the schedule for 'Entrance Camera' and 'Lobby Camera' to 'always' mode, 'high' quality, and 25 FPS for all 24 hours.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the Parking Lot and Loading Dock cameras schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for code or commands setting the schedule for 'Parking Lot Camera' and 'Loading Dock Camera' to 'always' mode, 'high' quality, 15 FPS for 08:00-22:00, and 'motionOnly' mode, 'normal' quality, 10 FPS for 22:00-08:00.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the Server Room camera schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for code or commands setting the schedule for 'Server Room Camera' to 'always' mode, 'low' quality, 5 FPS for weekdays (Mon-Fri), and 'motionOnly' mode, 'low' quality, 5 FPS for weekends (Sat-Sun).

task_completion.description: Agent exports a summary report of the configurations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command like `cat /home/ga/recording_schedule_report.txt` or a text editor showing the file `/home/ga/recording_schedule_report.txt` containing the schedule details for all five cameras.

integrity.description: The script or commands were actually executed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output showing the script being run (e.g., `python3 script.py`) or curl commands being executed, rather than just being written in an editor.

integrity.description: The report was generated programmatically or accurately reflects the API configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the report file wasn't just manually typed with fake data without any actual API interaction occurring in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Nx Witness REST API is at https://localhost:7001. Credentials: admin / Admin1234!. Schedules to verify: 1) Entrance & Lobby: 24/7 'always', high quality, 25fps. 2) Parking Lot & Loading Dock: 08:00-22:00 'always', high quality, 15fps; 22:00-08:00 'motionOnly', normal quality, 10fps. 3) Server Room: Mon-Fri 'always', low quality, 5fps; Sat-Sun 'motionOnly', low quality, 5fps. Report must be at /home/ga/recording_schedule_report.txt.
